hero.title: Custom Songs for Your Special Moments
hero.subtitle: Proposals, weddings, tributes — made with love. Create personalized music that tells your unique story.

features.title: How It Works
features.subtitle: Creating your personalized song is simple and magical

step1.title: Tell Your Story
step1.description: Answer a few questions about your special moment, the person, and the emotions you want to convey.

step2.title: Our Team Creates Your Song
step2.description: We deliver a unique song, created with dedication to transform your story into melody and words.

step3.title: Receive Your Masterpiece
step3.description: Receive your personalized song in high quality, ready to share with the world.

cta.title: Ready to create your song?
cta.subtitle: Join over 1,000 people who have already created unforgettable moments

pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Just professional quality music.

deliveryTimeDetails.description: Your personalized song is delivered within 48 hours after payment confirmation.

whatsIncluded.title: What's included?
whatsIncluded.description: High-quality MP3 file, personalized cover in high resolution, and complete song lyrics.

guarantee.title: Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not satisfied, we'll make adjustments at no additional cost. Your happiness is our priority.

deliveryTime.question: How long does it take to create my song?
deliveryTime.answer: Our standard delivery is 48 hours. For express orders, we can deliver in up to 12 hours.

adjustments.question: Can I request adjustments to the song?
adjustments.answer: Yes! We offer up to 2 free revisions to ensure you're 100% satisfied.

musicians.question: Who are the musicians?
musicians.answer: We work with experienced professional musicians and composers, specialized in different musical styles.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about creating your personalized song

musicStyles.question: What musical styles do you produce?
musicStyles.answer: We produce music in the following styles: Romantic, Gospel, Forró, Sertanejo, Pagode, Funk, Reggae, Pop, Rock, MPB and Trap. Our musicians are specialists in each genre.

deliveryTimes.question: How does the delivery time work?
deliveryTimes.answer: With the Standard plan, your song is ready in up to 7 days. With the Express plan, we deliver in up to 48 hours. You receive a preview before the final release.

whatYouGet.question: What do I receive at the end?
whatYouGet.answer: You receive a high-quality MP3 file, a personalized cover in high resolution, and the complete song lyrics. You can download and use it as many times as you want.

commercialUse.question: Can I use the song commercially?
commercialUse.answer: Yes! You have full rights to the song created. You can use it at events, on social media, brand campaigns, or any other purpose.

footer.description: We create personalized songs. Each composition is unique, created especially to move those you love.

vinyl.title: Listen to an Example
vinyl.subtitle: Each track is produced with real instruments and professional vocals

quiz.title: Tell Us About Your Special Moment
quiz.subtitle: Help us create the perfect song for you

questions.emotions: What emotions do you want to convey?
questions.style: What musical style do you prefer?
questions.name: What is the name of the person being honored?
questions.nameHint: Add pronunciation for clarity (e.g., Alicia, ah-lee-sha)
questions.styleDescription: Select the musical style for your personalized song
questions.vocalDescription: We recommend choosing the gender that best fits the personality of the song
questions.qualitiesDescription: Describe the character and qualities you value
questions.qualitiesPlaceholder: Are they patient, wise, funny, protective, encouraging? What makes them the amazing person they are?
questions.memoriesDescription: What moments with them do you treasure most?
questions.memoriesPlaceholder: Share how you met, special years, inside jokes, or moments that made your relationship unique...
questions.heartMessageDescription: Write anything you feel would be relevant to include in the song, and we'll do our best to include it!
questions.heartMessagePlaceholder: What do you want them to know, feel, or remember?

messages.dataLoaded: Data loaded! You can review and edit your answers.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using The Song Surprise, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

services.title: 2. Services Offered
services.content: The Song Surprise offers personalized song creation services. We are committed to delivering high-quality products within the established timeframes (7 days for the Standard Plan, 48 hours for the Express Plan).

copyright.title: 3. Copyright and Ownership
copyright.content: By purchasing a personalized song, you receive personal and commercial usage rights for the song created. The Song Surprise retains copyright over the musical composition but grants you a perpetual and irrevocable license to use the song as you wish.

payments.title: 4. Payments and Refunds
payments.content: All payments are processed securely through Stripe and Hotmart. In case of dissatisfaction, we offer free revisions. Refunds are evaluated on a case-by-case basis.

acceptableUse.title: 5. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.content: You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. It is not permitted to use the service to create illegal, defamatory content or content that violates third-party rights.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The Song Surprise is not responsible for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our services.

modifications.title: 7. Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will take effect immediately after publication on the website.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.content: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through our contact page.

notice.title: Important
notice.content: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. By using our services, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

information.title: 1. Information We Collect
information.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email, payment information, and details about the song you want to create.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use your information to: create and deliver your personalized song, process payments, send updates about your order, and improve our services.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties, except when necessary to process payments (Stripe and Hotmart) or when required by law.

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies to improve your website experience, keep you logged in, and analyze website traffic. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information at any time. Contact us to exercise these rights.

retention.title: 7. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. Created songs are stored indefinitely in your account.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes via email or notice on our website.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.content: For questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us through our contact page.
